title: The Escape Narrows Around the Sunny
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Chiffon, Unknown person #4, Pudding as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're going to carry the cake to the harbor now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whoa! That's amazing! They're already done?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've already baked up the form of it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once it's done, I'm sure even Mama will enjoy it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a Happy aroma! Am I in Heaven?! (?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I knew Lady pudding, Lady Chiffon, and the Wci 31 would pull through!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH- CH

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard that we'd head off Mama's eating fit here, on this island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're going to finish the cake on board our ship, and deliver it to Mama at sea!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you really suggest- ing that we let a rampaging Mama come aground to chocolat town?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we just contact Brother Peros, we can easily arrange a meeting at sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I understand, sister! You may pass.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the end of the line for you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why'd you do such a thing to your sister?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let us take the cake to the harbor!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Blood or not, nutiny is a grave sin!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shit... What should I do?! If I fight here and reveal who I am, they'll take in pub-ding as part of the nutiny, too!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My favor won't be repaid until I make sure Nami and the others are completely safe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They saved Lola's life! I have to honor that!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 40 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
